parameters.query:
={{ $('Engagement Sequence Config').item.json.testMode === true
  ? ($('Engagement Sequence Config').item.json.testLeadId
    ? "SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Owner.Email, FirstName, LastName, Email, Status, Engagement_Status__c, Last_Meaningful_Contact_Date__c, IsConverted, Next_Meeting_Date__c FROM Lead WHERE Id = '" + $('Engagement Sequence Config').item.json.testLeadId + "' AND IsConverted = false AND Email != null LIMIT 1"
    : "SELECT Id FROM Lead WHERE Id = null LIMIT 1")
  : "SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Owner.Email, FirstName, LastName, Email, Status, Engagement_Status__c, Last_Meaningful_Contact_Date__c, IsConverted, Next_Meeting_Date__c FROM Lead WHERE Engagement_Status__c = 'Active' AND IsConverted = false AND Email != null AND Status != 'Unqualified' AND Status != 'Do Not Contact' AND Status != 'Appointment Booked' AND Status != 'Follow-Up Requested' ORDER BY LastModifiedDate ASC LIMIT " + $('Engagement Sequence Config').item.json.lookaheadLimit }}

={{ "SELECT Id, Related_Lead__c, Sequence_Status__c, Active_Sequence_Step__c, Next_Follow_Up_Date_Lead__c, Last_Sequence_Step_Sent__c, Last_Sequence_Email_Sent_At__c, Sequence_Key__c FROM Engagement_Status_Tracker__c WHERE Related_Lead__c = '" + $json.Id + "' AND Sequence_Key__c = '" + $json.Id + "_Active_v2' LIMIT 1" }}

nodes.name: Split In Batches — Process One Lead

parameters.query: ={{ "SELECT Id, Sequence_Key__c, Last_Sequence_Email_Sent_At__c FROM Engagement_Status_Tracker__c WHERE Sequence_Key__c = '" + $json.sequenceKey + "_" + $json.step + "' LIMIT 1" }}
={{ "SELECT Id, WhoId, Subject FROM Task WHERE WhoId = '" + $json.leadId + "' AND Subject = '" + $json.callTaskSubject + "' LIMIT 1" }}

additionalFields.description:
={{ 'Active Engagement sequence (v2) — ' + $json.step + '

Lead: ' + $json.firstName + ' ' + $json.lastName + '
Email: ' + ($json.leadEmail || $json.email) + '
Engagement Status: ' + $json.engagementStatus + '
Sequence Key: ' + $json.sequenceKey + '
EST Record: ' + ($json.estId || 'new') + '

Action: Call the lead and attempt to book a Discovery Meeting.' }}
additionalFields.subject: ={{ $json.callTaskSubject }}

parameters.query: ={{ "SELECT Id, WhoId, Subject FROM Task WHERE WhoId = '" + $json.leadId + "' AND Subject = '" + $json.smsTaskSubject + "' LIMIT 1" }}
={{ "SELECT Id, WhoId, Subject FROM Task WHERE WhoId = '" + $json.leadId + "' AND Subject = '" + $json.voicemailTaskSubject + "' LIMIT 1" }}

nodes.name: Recover Context — Day 2 Call Task Check

additionalFields.description: Call the lead as part of the Active Engagement Day 2 touchpoint. Reference the prior email and invite them to schedule a brief Discovery Call.
additionalFields.subject: ={{ $json.voicemailTaskSubject }}

nodes.name: Recover Context After Day 2 Call Task
Skip Day 2 Call Task — Already Exists

parameters.query: ={{ "SELECT Id, WhoId, Subject FROM Task WHERE WhoId = '" + $json.leadId + "' AND Subject = '" + $json.statusReviewTaskSubject + "' LIMIT 1" }}

additionalFields.description: Review this lead after the final Active Engagement touchpoint. Choose the next outcome: Appointment Booked, Connected, Follow-Up Requested, Unqualified, or Move to Stalled. Do not automatically move the lead to Stalled unless manually reviewed.
additionalFields.subject: ={{ $json.statusReviewTaskSubject }}

parameters.query: ={{ "SELECT Id, WhoId, Subject FROM Task WHERE WhoId = '" + $json.leadId + "' AND Subject = '" + $json.manualEmailTaskSubject + "' LIMIT 1" }}
